ACC.summary: The ACC is a Power Four league that carries 7.41% of national title equity across 1000 simulations. Members fill 9.79% of all playoff field slots — a meaningful slice of the 12-team bracket. Miami Hurricanes is a heavy favorite at 42.5% conference title odds. The next tier includes SMU Mustangs (14.8%), Louisville Cardinals (12.3%), Clemson Tigers (6.3%). Miami Hurricanes averages 9.72 wins and reaches the playoff field in 53.8% of simulations. Miami Hurricanes is the league's top national title threat at 5.28% championship odds, and the top three teams hold 86.4% of the conference's title equity. Schedules are demanding: member teams average +0.6 strength of schedule in the model. Stanford Cardinal brings up the rear at 4.22 average wins.
